novel_features.name: Competitor scan
novel_features.description: Every new 510(k) clearance in a product code, ranked by recency, with applicant info.

novel_features.name: Predicate-chain walk
novel_features.description: Recursive ancestor tree from a K-number, flagging any predicate that's been recalled.

novel_features.name: Applicant history
novel_features.description: Every clearance ever issued to a company, grouped by clinical area with go-to predicates.

novel_features.name: Recall link graph
novel_features.description: Every recall on a device plus devices that used it as predicate.

novel_features.name: Market-entry radar
novel_features.description: New entrants in a product code, ranked by time-to-clearance.

novel_features.name: Safety pattern detector
novel_features.description: Devices in a category ranked by adverse-event count per year on market.

novel_features.name: Standing alerts
novel_features.description: Subscribe to product codes, applicants, predicate devices, or recall classes; pipes diff to file/Slack/webhook.

novel_features.name: Narrative story
novel_features.description: One-paragraph briefing about a K-number: who cleared it, predicate chain, related recalls.

novel_features.name: Cross-endpoint SQL
novel_features.description: Read-only SQL against the local mirror; join 510(k), recalls, MAUDE, classifications freely.
